synopsis: "A Two-Edged Sword," erroneously printed as "Two-Edged Sword," is a short story in Star Wars Insider 85 written by Karen Traviss. It is the sequel to "In His Image." Both were included in the paperback version of Legacy of the Force: Betrayal. It follows Darth Vader and Palpatine training clones for the stormtrooper corps and explores Vader's thoughts of betrayal and paranoia. It is set in about 18 BBY.
title: A Two-Edged Sword
